message:
fix(auth): include redirect_uri in OAuth token exchange per RFC 6749 §4.1.3

The random-port callback server sends redirect_uri in the authorization
request, but complete_copilot_browser_oauth did not include it in the
token exchange. Per RFC 6749 §4.1.3, redirect_uri MUST be included in
the token request if it was included in the authorization request.

- Added redirect_uri parameter to complete_copilot_browser_oauth
- Added redirect_uri field to PendingOAuth struct
- Threaded redirect_uri from OAuthStartInfo through to token exchange

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
